# PortableTestMachine2

Portable motor CW/CCW current characteristic inspection system.
Refactored from VB.NET WinForms → C# WPF (.NET 8.0).

## Platform
- .NET 8.0 (net8.0-windows), C#, WPF
- Resolution: 1024×768 (NoResize)
- Dark theme (WELD_MONITOR_IM style)

## Hardware
- Power Supply: SCPI over RS-232 (9600, 8N1, XOnXOff) — voltage control + current measurement
- IO Relay Board: Custom ASCII over RS-232 (115200, 8N1) — CW/CCW motor relay control

## NuGet Packages
- LiveChartsCore.SkiaSharpView.WPF 2.0.0-rc2 — realtime current chart
- System.IO.Ports 8.0.0 — serial communication
- ClosedXML 0.104.2 — Excel export

## File Map

### Core/
- `AppConfig.cs` — config.json R/W, strongly-typed settings (ports, volt, count, stop mode)
- `PathManager.cs` — path management (%LocalAppData%\PortableTestMachine2\)
- `Logger.cs` — thread-safe daily log + crash.log

### Communication/
- `IDeviceService.cs` — device common interface (Connect/Disconnect)
- `PowerSupplyService.cs` — SCPI power supply service (3-step polling: MEAS:CURR? → response → SOURS:VOLT)
- `PowerSupplyProtocol.cs` — SCPI command constants and builders
- `IoBoardService.cs` — IO relay board service (CW/CCW/OFF, DO frame send)
- `IoBoardProtocol.cs` — IO frame constants (S????????E format)

### Inspection/
- `InspectionState.cs` — InspectionStep enum (14 states) + InspectionContext data class
- `InspectionEngine.cs` — state machine engine, background thread, IInspectionCallback impl
- `StepHandlers/IStepHandler.cs` — step handler interface
- `StepHandlers/IInspectionCallback.cs` — callback interface (Log, DataPoint, Result, Completed)
- `StepHandlers/SetVoltageHandler.cs` — voltage setup (Step 10~12)
- `StepHandlers/InitHandler.cs` — inspection init (Step 20)
- `StepHandlers/CycleStartHandler.cs` — cycle start (Step 100)
- `StepHandlers/CwMeasureHandler.cs` — CW measurement (Step 200~204)
- `StepHandlers/CcwMeasureHandler.cs` — CCW measurement (Step 300~301)
- `StepHandlers/CycleCountHandler.cs` — cycle count (Step 400)
- `StepHandlers/CompleteHandler.cs` — inspection complete (Step 500)

### Models/
- `MeasureResult.cs` — measurement result (direction, voltage, max current, time)
- `IoState.cs` — DO bit state

### Data/
- `ExcelExporter.cs` — ClosedXML Excel export (.xlsx)

### UI
- `App.xaml` — global dark theme styles
- `App.xaml.cs` — global exception handler, PathManager init
- `MainWindow.xaml` — main dashboard (chart + condition + manual control + grid + log + buttons)
- `MainWindow.xaml.cs` — serial connect, 10ms polling, chart bindings, engine event handlers
- `AutoSettingsWindow.xaml` — auto inspection settings dialog
- `AutoSettingsWindow.xaml.cs` — settings load/save

## State Machine Flow
```
Idle(0) → SetVoltage(10) → Initialize(20) → CycleStart(100)
→ CwStart(200) → CwMeasure(201) → CwComplete(202) → CwWait(203) → CwToCcw(204)
→ CcwStart(300) → CcwMeasure(301) → CycleCount(400)
→ [repeat or Complete(500) → Idle(0)]
```

## Work History
- 2026-03-17: Initial refactoring from PortableTestMachine (VB.NET) — full rewrite to C# WPF .NET 8.0

# PortableTestMachine2 리팩토링 기획안

> 작성일: 2026-03-17
> 원본: PortableTestMachine (VB.NET, .NET Framework 4.8, WinForms)
> 대상: PortableTestMachine2 (C#, .NET 8.0, WPF)
> UI 테마: WELD_MONITOR_IM 다크 테마 동일 적용
> 해상도: 1024 × 768 (NoResize)

---

## 1. 기존 프로그램 요약

모터(팬/펌프) CW/CCW 방향 구동 전류 특성을 측정하는 휴대용 검사기.
- 전원공급기(SCPI, 9600bps) → 전압 인가 + 전류 측정
- IO 릴레이 보드(ASCII, 115200bps) → 모터 CW/CCW 방향 제어
- 자동 모드: 전압설정 → CW측정 → 대기 → CCW측정 → N회 반복
- 수동 모드: CW/CCW 스위치 직접 조작, 전압 수동 설정
- 결과: 실시간 전류 그래프 + 그리드 표시 + Excel 내보내기

---

## 2. 제거 대상 (라이선스 의존성 제거)

| 기존 | 대체 | 비고 |
|------|------|------|
| NI ScatterGraph | LiveChartsCore.SkiaSharpView.WPF | 실시간 전류 차트 |
| NI NumericEdit | WPF TextBox + 입력 검증 | 숫자 입력 |
| NI Switch | WPF ToggleButton (커스텀 스타일) | CW/CCW 스위치 |
| FlexCell Grid | WPF DataGrid | 결과 테이블 |
| FlexCell ExportToExcel | ClosedXML (.xlsx) | Excel 내보내기 |
| INI 파일 (kernel32 P/Invoke) | config.json + 타입 클래스 | 설정 관리 |
| VB Module 전역변수 | DI / 싱글톤 서비스 | 상태 관리 |

---

## 3. 플랫폼 및 패키지

| 항목 | 값 |
|------|-----|
| TFM | net8.0-windows |
| 언어 | C# |
| UI | WPF (XAML) |
| 차트 | LiveChartsCore.SkiaSharpView.WPF 2.0.0-rc2 |
| 시리얼 | System.IO.Ports 8.0.0 |
| Excel | ClosedXML 0.104.2 |
| JSON | System.Text.Json (내장) |

---

## 4. UI 테마 (WELD_MONITOR_IM 동일)

| 요소 | 색상 |
|------|------|
| 배경 | #1E1E1E |
| 카드/패널 | #2B2B2B |
| 호버 | #363636 |
| 테두리 | #3A3A3A |
| 텍스트 (주) | #FFFFFF |
| 텍스트 (부) | #9CA3AF |
| 전류 값 강조 | #60A5FA (파란색) |
| 전압 값 강조 | #4ADE80 (초록색) |
| START 버튼 | #1A3D2E 배경 |
| STOP 버튼 | #3B1818 배경 |
| 설정 버튼 | #2D2D3D 배경 |
| CornerRadius | 4~8px |
| 폰트 모노스페이스 | Consolas (수치 표시) |

---

## 5. 프로젝트 구조

```
PortableTestMachine2/
├── Core/
│   ├── AppConfig.cs              # config.json 읽기/쓰기 + 타입 클래스
│   ├── PathManager.cs            # 경로 관리 (%LocalAppData%\PortableTestMachine2\)
│   └── Logger.cs                 # 이벤트/에러 로그
│
├── Communication/
│   ├── IDeviceService.cs         # 장치 공통 인터페이스
│   ├── PowerSupplyService.cs     # 전원공급기 SCPI 통신 (9600, XOnXOff)
│   ├── PowerSupplyProtocol.cs    # SCPI 명령/응답 파싱
│   ├── IoBoardService.cs         # IO 릴레이 보드 통신 (115200)
│   └── IoBoardProtocol.cs        # DO 프레임 생성 (S????????E)
│
├── Inspection/
│   ├── InspectionEngine.cs       # 상태머신 메인 루프
│   ├── InspectionState.cs        # 상태 enum + 데이터
│   └── StepHandlers/
│       ├── IStepHandler.cs       # 핸들러 인터페이스
│       ├── SetVoltageHandler.cs  # wStep 10~12: 전압 설정
│       ├── InitHandler.cs        # wStep 20: 초기화
│       ├── CwMeasureHandler.cs   # wStep 200~204: CW 측정
│       ├── CcwMeasureHandler.cs  # wStep 300~301: CCW 측정
│       ├── CycleCountHandler.cs  # wStep 400: 반복 카운트
│       └── CompleteHandler.cs    # wStep 500: 완료
│
├── Models/
│   ├── MeasureResult.cs          # 측정 결과 (방향, 전압, 최대전류, 시간)
│   └── IoState.cs                # DO 비트 상태
│
├── Data/
│   └── ExcelExporter.cs          # ClosedXML Excel 내보내기
│
├── App.xaml                      # 전역 스타일 (다크 테마)
├── App.xaml.cs                   # 서비스 초기화 + 예외 핸들러
├── MainWindow.xaml               # 메인 화면 (1024×768)
├── MainWindow.xaml.cs
├── AutoSettingsWindow.xaml       # 자동 검사 설정
├── AutoSettingsWindow.xaml.cs
└── ftech.ico                     # 아이콘
```

---

## 6. 메인 화면 레이아웃 (1024×768)

```
┌──────────────────────────────────────────────────────┐
│ [로고]  PORTABLE INSPECTION SYSTEM            헤더바 │ 50px
├────────────────────────────────┬─────────────────────┤
│                                │  - Condition -      │
│                                │  Voltage: 12.0 V    │
│    실시간 전류 그래프           │  Current: 0.52 A    │ 140px
│    (LiveCharts2)               ├─────────────────────┤
│                                │  - Manual Control - │
│    X: Time(s)                  │  [CW]  [CCW]        │
│    Y: Current(A)               │                     │
│                                │  - Volt Setting -   │ 350px
│                                │  [___] V  [SET]     │
│                                │                     │
├────────────────────────────────┴─────────────────────┤
│  결과 DataGrid          │  시스템 로그 TextBox        │ 180px
│  No|Info|V|MaxA|Time    │                             │
├──────────────────────────────────────────────────────┤
│ [AUTO SET] [AUTO START] [AUTO STOP] [REPORT]  [EXIT] │ 48px
└──────────────────────────────────────────────────────┘
```

---

## 7. 통신 프로토콜 (기존 100% 유지)

### 7-1. 전원공급기 (SCPI)
- 포트: config.json `powerSupplyPort`
- 9600bps, 8N1, XOnXOff
- 초기화: `*ADR 1`
- 폴링: `MEAS:CURR?` → CR 종료 → double 파싱
- 전압 설정: `SOURS:VOLT {값}`
- 타임아웃: 2초 (응답 없으면 리셋)

### 7-2. IO 릴레이 보드
- 포트: config.json `ioBoardPort`
- 115200bps, 8N1, None
- 프레임: `S` + 8자리 비트 + `E` (예: `S10000000E`)
- DO[0]=CW, DO[1]=CCW
- 10ms 주기 송신

---

## 8. 상태머신 (기존 동일, enum 기반)

```csharp
public enum InspectionStep
{
    Idle = 0,           // 대기/모니터링
    SetVoltage = 10,    // 전압 설정
    Initialize = 20,    // 검사 초기화
    CwStart = 200,      // CW 구동 시작
    CwMeasure = 201,    // CW 전류 측정
    CwComplete = 202,   // CW 완료 처리
    CwWait = 203,       // CW 후 1초 대기
    CwToCcw = 204,      // CCW 전환 준비
    CcwStart = 300,     // CCW 구동 시작
    CcwMeasure = 301,   // CCW 전류 측정
    CycleCount = 400,   // 반복 카운트 판정
    Complete = 500      // 검사 완료
}
```

---

## 9. 설정 파일 (INI → config.json)

```json
{
  "powerSupplyPort": "COM3",
  "ioBoardPort": "COM4",
  "autoVolt": 12.0,
  "autoCount": 5,
  "autoStopMode": "CURRENT",
  "autoStopValue": 0.5,
  "manualVolt": 12.0
}
```
경로: `%LocalAppData%\PortableTestMachine2\config.json`

---

## 10. 기존 버그 수정 사항

| 버그 | 원인 | 수정 방안 |
|------|------|-----------|
| IO 포트 설정 저장 안 됨 | SaveSetData()에 IoPortNumber 키 누락 | config.json 통합 저장으로 해결 |
| 크로스스레드 UI 접근 | `CheckForIllegalCrossThreadCalls = False` | Dispatcher.Invoke 사용 |
| ModeAuto 미사용 | 플래그만 선언, 제어 미연동 | 상태머신에서 수동/자동 분리 |
| wStep Double 타입 | 상태값이 부동소수점 | enum (int) 기반으로 변경 |

---

## 11. Excel 내보내기

- 기존: FlexCell.ExportToExcel → .xls
- 변경: ClosedXML → .xlsx
- 경로: `%LocalAppData%\PortableTestMachine2\Excel\yyyy-MM-dd_HH_mm_ss.xlsx`
- 컬럼: No, Info (SEQ-N CW/CCW), Volt(V), Current Max(A), Time(s)

---

## 12. 예외 처리

- App.xaml.cs: `DispatcherUnhandledException` + `AppDomain.UnhandledException` → crash.log
- 통신 스레드: try-catch 필수
- 시리얼 포트 연결 실패 시 로그 + UI 알림 (프로그램 중단 안 함)

---

## 13. 작업 순서

| 순서 | 작업 | 예상 파일 |
|------|------|-----------|
| 1 | 프로젝트 생성 + NuGet + App.xaml 다크 테마 | .csproj, App.xaml |
| 2 | Core (AppConfig, PathManager, Logger) | Core/*.cs |
| 3 | Communication (PowerSupply, IoBoard) | Communication/*.cs |
| 4 | Models (MeasureResult, IoState) | Models/*.cs |
| 5 | Inspection 상태머신 + StepHandlers | Inspection/*.cs |
| 6 | MainWindow UI + 바인딩 | MainWindow.xaml/cs |
| 7 | AutoSettingsWindow | AutoSettingsWindow.xaml/cs |
| 8 | Data (ExcelExporter) | Data/*.cs |
| 9 | 빌드 + 테스트 | - |

<Window x:Class="PortableTestMachine2.MainWindow"
        xmlns="http://schemas.microsoft.com/winfx/2006/xaml/presentation"
        xmlns:x="http://schemas.microsoft.com/winfx/2006/xaml"
        xmlns:lvc="clr-namespace:LiveChartsCore.SkiaSharpView.WPF;assembly=LiveChartsCore.SkiaSharpView.WPF"
        Title="PORTABLE INSPECTION SYSTEM"
        Icon="ftech.ico"
        Width="1024" Height="768"
        ResizeMode="NoResize"
        WindowStartupLocation="CenterScreen"
        Background="#1E1E1E">

    <DockPanel>

        <!-- 상단 헤더 바 -->
        <Border DockPanel.Dock="Top" Height="50" Background="#2B2B2B">
            <Grid>
                <!-- 좌측 로고 -->
                <Image Source="Assets/Ftech.png" Height="36" HorizontalAlignment="Left" Margin="12,0,0,0"/>
                <!-- 중앙 타이틀 -->
                <TextBlock Text="PORTABLE INSPECTION SYSTEM"
                           FontSize="18" FontWeight="Bold" Foreground="#FFFFFF"
                           HorizontalAlignment="Center" VerticalAlignment="Center"/>
            </Grid>
        </Border>

        <!-- 하단 버튼 바 -->
        <Border DockPanel.Dock="Bottom" Height="50" Background="#2B2B2B"
                BorderBrush="#3A3A3A" BorderThickness="0,1,0,0">
            <Grid Margin="8,0">
                <StackPanel Orientation="Horizontal" HorizontalAlignment="Center" VerticalAlignment="Center">
                    <Button x:Name="btnAutoSet" Content="AUTO SET"
                            Background="#2D2D3D" Width="120" Margin="4"
                            Click="btnAutoSet_Click"/>
                    <Button x:Name="btnAutoStart" Content="AUTO START"
                            Background="#1A3D2E" Width="120" Margin="4"
                            Click="btnAutoStart_Click"/>
                    <Button x:Name="btnAutoStop" Content="AUTO STOP"
                            Background="#3B1818" Width="120" Margin="4"
                            Click="btnAutoStop_Click"/>
                    <Button x:Name="btnReport" Content="REPORT"
                            Background="#2D2D3D" Width="120" Margin="4"
                            Click="btnReport_Click"/>
                </StackPanel>
                <Button x:Name="btnExit" Content="EXIT"
                        Background="#3B1818" Width="80" Margin="4"
                        HorizontalAlignment="Right" VerticalAlignment="Center"
                        Click="btnExit_Click"/>
            </Grid>
        </Border>

        <!-- 중앙 콘텐츠 -->
        <Grid Margin="8">
            <Grid.RowDefinitions>
                <RowDefinition Height="3*"/>
                <RowDefinition Height="2*"/>
            </Grid.RowDefinitions>
            <Grid.ColumnDefinitions>
                <ColumnDefinition Width="*"/>
                <ColumnDefinition Width="220"/>
            </Grid.ColumnDefinitions>

            <!-- [Row 0, Col 0] 차트 영역 -->
            <Border Grid.Row="0" Grid.Column="0" Style="{StaticResource CardStyle}" Margin="0,0,4,4">
                <lvc:CartesianChart x:Name="chart"/>
            </Border>

            <!-- [Row 0, Col 1] 우측 패널 -->
            <StackPanel Grid.Row="0" Grid.Column="1" Margin="4,0,0,4">

                <!-- 카드 1: Condition -->
                <Border Style="{StaticResource CardStyle}" Margin="0,0,0,4">
                    <StackPanel>
                        <TextBlock Text="- Condition -" Foreground="#9CA3AF"
                                   HorizontalAlignment="Center" Margin="0,0,0,8"/>
                        <Grid>
                            <Grid.RowDefinitions>
                                <RowDefinition Height="Auto"/>
                                <RowDefinition Height="Auto"/>
                            </Grid.RowDefinitions>
                            <Grid.ColumnDefinitions>
                                <ColumnDefinition Width="Auto"/>
                                <ColumnDefinition Width="*"/>
                            </Grid.ColumnDefinitions>

                            <!-- 전압 -->
                            <TextBlock Grid.Row="0" Grid.Column="0"
                                       Text="Voltage" Foreground="#9CA3AF"
                                       VerticalAlignment="Center" Margin="0,4"/>
                            <TextBlock x:Name="txtVoltage" Grid.Row="0" Grid.Column="1"
                                       Text="0.0 V" FontFamily="Consolas" FontSize="22"
                                       Foreground="#4ADE80" HorizontalAlignment="Right"
                                       VerticalAlignment="Center" Margin="0,4"/>

                            <!-- 전류 -->
                            <TextBlock Grid.Row="1" Grid.Column="0"
                                       Text="Current" Foreground="#9CA3AF"
                                       VerticalAlignment="Center" Margin="0,4"/>
                            <TextBlock x:Name="txtCurrent" Grid.Row="1" Grid.Column="1"
                                       Text="0.000 A" FontFamily="Consolas" FontSize="22"
                                       Foreground="#60A5FA" HorizontalAlignment="Right"
                                       VerticalAlignment="Center" Margin="0,4"/>
                        </Grid>
                    </StackPanel>
                </Border>

                <!-- 카드 2: Manual Control -->
                <Border Style="{StaticResource CardStyle}">
                    <StackPanel>
                        <TextBlock Text="- Manual Control -" Foreground="#9CA3AF"
                                   HorizontalAlignment="Center" Margin="0,0,0,8"/>

                        <!-- CW / CCW 토글 -->
                        <Grid Margin="0,0,0,8">
                            <Grid.ColumnDefinitions>
                                <ColumnDefinition Width="*"/>
                                <ColumnDefinition Width="*"/>
                            </Grid.ColumnDefinitions>
                            <ToggleButton x:Name="btnCW" Content="CW"
                                          Width="80" Height="40" Margin="0,0,4,0"
                                          Click="btnCW_Click"/>
                            <ToggleButton x:Name="btnCCW" Content="CCW"
                                          Grid.Column="1" Width="80" Height="40" Margin="4,0,0,0"
                                          Click="btnCCW_Click"/>
                        </Grid>

                        <!-- 구분선 -->
                        <Separator Background="#3A3A3A" Margin="0,4"/>

                        <!-- 전압 설정 -->
                        <TextBlock Text="- Volt Setting -" Foreground="#9CA3AF"
                                   HorizontalAlignment="Center" Margin="0,8,0,8"/>
                        <StackPanel Orientation="Horizontal" HorizontalAlignment="Center">
                            <TextBox x:Name="txtManualVolt" Width="80" FontFamily="Consolas"
                                     VerticalContentAlignment="Center"/>
                            <TextBlock Text="V" Foreground="#FFFFFF" Margin="4,0,0,0"
                                       VerticalAlignment="Center"/>
                            <Button x:Name="btnSetVolt" Content="SET" Width="50" Margin="8,0,0,0"
                                    Click="btnSetVolt_Click"/>
                        </StackPanel>
                    </StackPanel>
                </Border>
            </StackPanel>

            <!-- [Row 1, Col 0] 결과 데이터그리드 -->
            <Border Grid.Row="1" Grid.Column="0" Style="{StaticResource CardStyle}" Margin="0,4,4,0">
                <DataGrid x:Name="dgResults"
                          AutoGenerateColumns="False"
                          IsReadOnly="True"
                          HeadersVisibility="Column"
                          CanUserResizeColumns="False"
                          CanUserReorderColumns="False"
                          SelectionMode="Single"
                          VerticalScrollBarVisibility="Auto">
                    <DataGrid.Columns>
                        <DataGridTextColumn Header="No" Binding="{Binding SequenceNo}" Width="50"/>
                        <DataGridTextColumn Header="Info" Binding="{Binding Info}" Width="140"/>
                        <DataGridTextColumn Header="Volt(V)" Binding="{Binding Voltage, StringFormat=F1}" Width="80"/>
                        <DataGridTextColumn Header="Current Max(A)" Binding="{Binding MaxCurrent, StringFormat=F3}" Width="120"/>
                        <DataGridTextColumn Header="Time(s)" Binding="{Binding ElapsedTime, StringFormat=F2}" Width="80"/>
                    </DataGrid.Columns>
                </DataGrid>
            </Border>

            <!-- [Row 1, Col 1] 시스템 로그 -->
            <Border Grid.Row="1" Grid.Column="1" Style="{StaticResource CardStyle}" Margin="4,4,0,0">
                <TextBox x:Name="txtLog"
                         IsReadOnly="True"
                         TextWrapping="Wrap"
                         VerticalScrollBarVisibility="Auto"
                         Background="Transparent"
                         BorderThickness="0"
                         Foreground="#9CA3AF"
                         FontSize="11"/>
            </Border>
        </Grid>

    </DockPanel>
</Window>

<Window x:Class="PortableTestMachine2.AutoSettingsWindow"
        xmlns="http://schemas.microsoft.com/winfx/2006/xaml/presentation"
        xmlns:x="http://schemas.microsoft.com/winfx/2006/xaml"
        Title="자동 검사 설정"
        Width="500" Height="480"
        ResizeMode="NoResize"
        WindowStartupLocation="CenterOwner"
        WindowStyle="None"
        Background="#1E1E1E"
        AllowsTransparency="True">

    <Border BorderBrush="#3A3A3A" BorderThickness="1" CornerRadius="6" Background="#1E1E1E">
        <DockPanel>

            <!-- 커스텀 타이틀 바 -->
            <Border DockPanel.Dock="Top" Height="36" Background="#2B2B2B"
                    CornerRadius="6,6,0,0"
                    MouseLeftButtonDown="TitleBar_MouseLeftButtonDown">
                <Grid>
                    <TextBlock Text="검사 설정" FontSize="14" Foreground="#FFFFFF"
                               VerticalAlignment="Center" Margin="12,0,0,0"/>
                    <Button x:Name="btnTitleClose" Content="X"
                            HorizontalAlignment="Right" VerticalAlignment="Center"
                            Width="36" Height="36"
                            Background="Transparent" BorderThickness="0"
                            Foreground="#9CA3AF" FontSize="14"
                            Click="btnClose_Click"/>
                </Grid>
            </Border>

            <!-- 콘텐츠 영역 -->
            <StackPanel Margin="20">

                <!-- 포트 설정 -->
                <TextBlock Text="통신 포트" Foreground="#9CA3AF" FontSize="12" Margin="0,0,0,6"/>
                <Grid Margin="0,0,0,16">
                    <Grid.RowDefinitions>
                        <RowDefinition Height="40"/>
                        <RowDefinition Height="40"/>
                    </Grid.RowDefinitions>
                    <Grid.ColumnDefinitions>
                        <ColumnDefinition Width="140"/>
                        <ColumnDefinition Width="*"/>
                    </Grid.ColumnDefinitions>

                    <Label Grid.Row="0" Grid.Column="0"
                           Content="파워서플라이" VerticalAlignment="Center"/>
                    <ComboBox x:Name="cboSupplyPort" Grid.Row="0" Grid.Column="1"
                              Margin="0,4" Width="200" HorizontalAlignment="Left"
                              FontFamily="Consolas"/>

                    <Label Grid.Row="1" Grid.Column="0"
                           Content="IO 보드" VerticalAlignment="Center"/>
                    <ComboBox x:Name="cboIoPort" Grid.Row="1" Grid.Column="1"
                              Margin="0,4" Width="200" HorizontalAlignment="Left"
                              FontFamily="Consolas"/>
                </Grid>

                <!-- 구분선 -->
                <Border Height="1" Background="#3A3A3A" Margin="0,0,0,12"/>

                <!-- 자동 검사 설정 -->
                <TextBlock Text="자동 검사" Foreground="#9CA3AF" FontSize="12" Margin="0,0,0,6"/>
                <Grid>
                    <Grid.RowDefinitions>
                        <RowDefinition Height="40"/>
                        <RowDefinition Height="40"/>
                        <RowDefinition Height="40"/>
                        <RowDefinition Height="40"/>
                    </Grid.RowDefinitions>
                    <Grid.ColumnDefinitions>
                        <ColumnDefinition Width="140"/>
                        <ColumnDefinition Width="*"/>
                    </Grid.ColumnDefinitions>

                    <!-- 구동 전압 -->
                    <Label Grid.Row="0" Grid.Column="0"
                           Content="구동 전압 (V)" VerticalAlignment="Center"/>
                    <TextBox x:Name="txtVolt" Grid.Row="0" Grid.Column="1"
                             FontFamily="Consolas" VerticalContentAlignment="Center"
                             Margin="0,4" Width="200" HorizontalAlignment="Left"/>

                    <!-- 검사 횟수 -->
                    <Label Grid.Row="1" Grid.Column="0"
                           Content="검사 횟수" VerticalAlignment="Center"/>
                    <TextBox x:Name="txtCount" Grid.Row="1" Grid.Column="1"
                             FontFamily="Consolas" VerticalContentAlignment="Center"
                             Margin="0,4" Width="200" HorizontalAlignment="Left"/>

                    <!-- 정지 조건 -->
                    <Label Grid.Row="2" Grid.Column="0"
                           Content="정지 조건" VerticalAlignment="Center"/>
                    <ComboBox x:Name="cboStopMode" Grid.Row="2" Grid.Column="1"
                              Margin="0,4" Width="200" HorizontalAlignment="Left"
                              SelectionChanged="cboStopMode_SelectionChanged">
                        <ComboBoxItem Content="CURRENT"/>
                        <ComboBoxItem Content="TIME"/>
                    </ComboBox>

                    <!-- 정지 기준값 -->
                    <Label Grid.Row="3" Grid.Column="0"
                           Content="정지 기준값" VerticalAlignment="Center"/>
                    <StackPanel Grid.Row="3" Grid.Column="1" Orientation="Horizontal"
                                Margin="0,4" VerticalAlignment="Center">
                        <TextBox x:Name="txtStopValue" FontFamily="Consolas"
                                 VerticalContentAlignment="Center" Width="160"/>
                        <TextBlock x:Name="txtUnit" Text="A" Foreground="#9CA3AF"
                                   VerticalAlignment="Center" Margin="8,0,0,0" FontSize="14"/>
                    </StackPanel>
                </Grid>

                <!-- 하단 버튼 -->
                <StackPanel Orientation="Horizontal" HorizontalAlignment="Right" Margin="0,20,0,0">
                    <Button x:Name="btnSave" Content="저장"
                            Background="#1E3A5F" Width="80"
                            Click="btnSave_Click"/>
                    <Button x:Name="btnCancel" Content="닫기"
                            Width="80" Margin="8,0,0,0"
                            Click="btnClose_Click"/>
                </StackPanel>

            </StackPanel>
        </DockPanel>
    </Border>
</Window>

1→<Application x:Class="PortableTestMachine2.App"
     2→             xmlns="http://schemas.microsoft.com/winfx/2006/xaml/presentation"
     3→             xmlns:x="http://schemas.microsoft.com/winfx/2006/xaml"
     4→             StartupUri="MainWindow.xaml">
     5→    <Application.Resources>
     6→
     7→        <!-- 윈도우 기본 스타일 -->
     8→        <Style TargetType="Window">
     9→            <Setter Property="Background" Value="#1E1E1E"/>
    10→            <Setter Property="Foreground" Value="#FFFFFF"/>
    11→        </Style>
    12→
    13→        <!-- 라벨 스타일 -->
    14→        <Style TargetType="Label">
    15→            <Setter Property="Foreground" Value="#FFFFFF"/>
    16→        </Style>
    17→
    18→        <!-- 버튼 기본 스타일 (CornerRadius 6 적용 템플릿) -->
    19→        <Style TargetType="Button">
    20→            <Setter Property="Background" Value="#333333"/>
    21→            <Setter Property="Foreground" Value="#FFFFFF"/>
    22→            <Setter Property="BorderBrush" Value="#3A3A3A"/>
    23→            <Setter Property="BorderThickness" Value="1"/>
    24→            <Setter Property="Padding" Value="12,6"/>
    25→            <Setter Property="FontSize" Value="13"/>
    26→            <Setter Property="Cursor" Value="Hand"/>
    27→            <Setter Property="Template">
    28→                <Setter.Value>
    29→                    <ControlTemplate TargetType="Button">
    30→                        <Border x:Name="border"
    31→                                Background="{TemplateBinding Background}"
    32→                                BorderBrush="{TemplateBinding BorderBrush}"
    33→                                BorderThickness="{TemplateBinding BorderThickness}"
    34→                                CornerRadius="6"
    35→                                Padding="{TemplateBinding Padding}">
    36→                            <ContentPresenter HorizontalAlignment="Center" VerticalAlignment="Center"/>
    37→                        </Border>
    38→                        <ControlTemplate.Triggers>
    39→                            <Trigger Property="IsMouseOver" Value="True">
    40→                                <Setter TargetName="border" Property="Background" Value="#444444"/>
    41→                            </Trigger>
    42→                            <Trigger Property="IsPressed" Value="True">
    43→                                <Setter TargetName="border" Property="Background" Value="#555555"/>
    44→                            </Trigger>
    45→                        </ControlTemplate.Triggers>
    46→                    </ControlTemplate>
    47→                </Setter.Value>
    48→            </Setter>
    49→        </Style>
    50→
    51→        <!-- 토글버튼 스타일 -->
    52→        <Style TargetType="ToggleButton">
    53→            <Setter Property="Background" Value="#333333"/>
    54→            <Setter Property="Foreground" Value="#FFFFFF"/>
    55→            <Setter Property="BorderBrush" Value="#3A3A3A"/>
    56→            <Setter Property="BorderThickness" Value="1"/>
    57→            <Setter Property="Padding" Value="12,6"/>
    58→            <Setter Property="FontSize" Value="13"/>
    59→            <Setter Property="Cursor" Value="Hand"/>
    60→            <Setter Property="Template">
    61→                <Setter.Value>
    62→                    <ControlTemplate TargetType="ToggleButton">
    63→                        <Border x:Name="border"
    64→                                Background="{TemplateBinding Background}"
    65→                                BorderBrush="{TemplateBinding BorderBrush}"
    66→                                BorderThickness="{TemplateBinding BorderThickness}"
    67→                                CornerRadius="6"
    68→                                Padding="{TemplateBinding Padding}">
    69→                            <ContentPresenter HorizontalAlignment="Center" VerticalAlignment="Center"/>
    70→                        </Border>
    71→                        <ControlTemplate.Triggers>
    72→                            <Trigger Property="IsChecked" Value="True">

<Application x:Class="PortableTestMachine2.App"
             xmlns="http://schemas.microsoft.com/winfx/2006/xaml/presentation"
             xmlns:x="http://schemas.microsoft.com/winfx/2006/xaml"
             StartupUri="MainWindow.xaml">
    <Application.Resources>

        <!-- 윈도우 기본 스타일 -->
        <Style TargetType="Window">
            <Setter Property="Background" Value="#1E1E1E"/>
            <Setter Property="Foreground" Value="#FFFFFF"/>
        </Style>

        <!-- 라벨 스타일 -->
        <Style TargetType="Label">
            <Setter Property="Foreground" Value="#FFFFFF"/>
        </Style>

        <!-- 버튼 기본 스타일 (CornerRadius 6 적용 템플릿) -->
        <Style TargetType="Button">
            <Setter Property="Background" Value="#333333"/>
            <Setter Property="Foreground" Value="#FFFFFF"/>
            <Setter Property="BorderBrush" Value="#3A3A3A"/>
            <Setter Property="BorderThickness" Value="1"/>
            <Setter Property="Padding" Value="12,6"/>
            <Setter Property="FontSize" Value="13"/>
            <Setter Property="Cursor" Value="Hand"/>
            <Setter Property="Template">
                <Setter.Value>
                    <ControlTemplate TargetType="Button">
                        <Border x:Name="border"
                                Background="{TemplateBinding Background}"
                                BorderBrush="{TemplateBinding BorderBrush}"
                                BorderThickness="{TemplateBinding BorderThickness}"
                                CornerRadius="6"
                                Padding="{TemplateBinding Padding}">
                            <ContentPresenter HorizontalAlignment="Center" VerticalAlignment="Center"/>
                        </Border>
                        <ControlTemplate.Triggers>
                            <Trigger Property="IsMouseOver" Value="True">
                                <Setter TargetName="border" Property="Background" Value="#444444"/>
                            </Trigger>
                            <Trigger Property="IsPressed" Value="True">
                                <Setter TargetName="border" Property="Background" Value="#555555"/>
                            </Trigger>
                        </ControlTemplate.Triggers>
                    </ControlTemplate>
                </Setter.Value>
            </Setter>
        </Style>

        <!-- 토글버튼 스타일 -->
        <Style TargetType="ToggleButton">
            <Setter Property="Background" Value="#333333"/>
            <Setter Property="Foreground" Value="#FFFFFF"/>
            <Setter Property="BorderBrush" Value="#3A3A3A"/>
            <Setter Property="BorderThickness" Value="1"/>
            <Setter Property="Padding" Value="12,6"/>
            <Setter Property="FontSize" Value="13"/>
            <Setter Property="Cursor" Value="Hand"/>
            <Setter Property="Template">
                <Setter.Value>
                    <ControlTemplate TargetType="ToggleButton">
                        <Border x:Name="border"
                                Background="{TemplateBinding Background}"
                                BorderBrush="{TemplateBinding BorderBrush}"
                                BorderThickness="{TemplateBinding BorderThickness}"
                                CornerRadius="6"
                                Padding="{TemplateBinding Padding}">
                            <ContentPresenter HorizontalAlignment="Center" VerticalAlignment="Center"/>
                        </Border>
                        <ControlTemplate.Triggers>
                            <Trigger Property="IsChecked" Value="True">
                                <Setter TargetName="border" Property="Background" Value="#1A3D2E"/>
                                <Setter TargetName="border" Property="BorderBrush" Value="#22C55E"/>
                            </Trigger>
                            <Trigger Property="IsMouseOver" Value="True">
                                <Setter TargetName="border" Property="Background" Value="#444444"/>
                            </Trigger>
                        </ControlTemplate.Triggers>
                    </ControlTemplate>
                </Setter.Value>
            </Setter>
        </Style>

        <!-- 텍스트박스 스타일 -->
        <Style TargetType="TextBox">
            <Setter Property="Background" Value="#2B2B2B"/>
            <Setter Property="Foreground" Value="#FFFFFF"/>
            <Setter Property="BorderBrush" Value="#3A3A3A"/>
            <Setter Property="BorderThickness" Value="1"/>
            <Setter Property="CaretBrush" Value="White"/>
            <Setter Property="Padding" Value="6,4"/>
        </Style>

        <!-- 콤보박스 스타일 -->
        <Style TargetType="ComboBox">
            <Setter Property="Background" Value="#2B2B2B"/>
            <Setter Property="Foreground" Value="#FFFFFF"/>
            <Setter Property="BorderBrush" Value="#3A3A3A"/>
            <Setter Property="BorderThickness" Value="1"/>
        </Style>

        <!-- 데이터그리드 스타일 -->
        <Style TargetType="DataGrid">
            <Setter Property="Background" Value="Transparent"/>
            <Setter Property="RowBackground" Value="#252525"/>
            <Setter Property="AlternatingRowBackground" Value="#2B2B2B"/>
            <Setter Property="Foreground" Value="#FFFFFF"/>
            <Setter Property="GridLinesVisibility" Value="Horizontal"/>
            <Setter Property="HorizontalGridLinesBrush" Value="#3A3A3A"/>
            <Setter Property="BorderBrush" Value="#3A3A3A"/>
            <Setter Property="BorderThickness" Value="0"/>
        </Style>

        <!-- 데이터그리드 컬럼 헤더 스타일 -->
        <Style TargetType="DataGridColumnHeader">
            <Setter Property="Background" Value="#333333"/>
            <Setter Property="Foreground" Value="#9CA3AF"/>
            <Setter Property="Padding" Value="8,4"/>
            <Setter Property="BorderBrush" Value="#3A3A3A"/>
            <Setter Property="BorderThickness" Value="0,0,1,1"/>
        </Style>

        <!-- 데이터그리드 셀 스타일 -->
        <Style TargetType="DataGridCell">
            <Setter Property="BorderThickness" Value="0"/>
            <Setter Property="Padding" Value="4,2"/>
            <Style.Triggers>
                <Trigger Property="IsSelected" Value="True">
                    <Setter Property="Background" Value="#363636"/>
                    <Setter Property="Foreground" Value="#FFFFFF"/>
                </Trigger>
            </Style.Triggers>
        </Style>

        <!-- 데이터그리드 행 스타일 -->
        <Style TargetType="DataGridRow">
            <Style.Triggers>
                <Trigger Property="IsSelected" Value="True">
                    <Setter Property="Background" Value="#363636"/>
                </Trigger>
            </Style.Triggers>
        </Style>

        <!-- 카드 스타일 (Border 용) -->
        <Style x:Key="CardStyle" TargetType="Border">
            <Setter Property="Background" Value="#2B2B2B"/>
            <Setter Property="BorderBrush" Value="#3A3A3A"/>
            <Setter Property="BorderThickness" Value="1"/>
            <Setter Property="CornerRadius" Value="6"/>
            <Setter Property="Padding" Value="12"/>
        </Style>

    </Application.Resources>
</Application>

빌드 성공 (0 오류, 0 경고). 코드를 분석한 결과 몇 가지 문제를 발견했습니다.

## 발견된 문제점

1. **InspectionEngine.Start()에서 초기 스텝 미설정** — `_context.CurrentStep`이 `Idle`인 채로 스레드가 시작되어 아무 동작도 안 함
2. **Start() 시 Context Reset 미호출** — 이전 결과 데이터가 남아있을 수 있음
3. **CcwMeasureHandler에서 CCW 결과 미생성** — CCW 측정 완료 시 바로 CycleCount로 넘어가는데, CycleCountHandler에서 CCW 결과를 생성하므로 구조적으로는 동작하나 CCW 측정 완료 처리(모터 OFF + 대기)가 없음

수정할까요? 주요 수정 내용:
1. `InspectionEngine.Start()`에서 `_context.Reset()` + `CurrentStep = SetVoltage` 설정
2. CCW 완료 후 모터 OFF + 1초 대기 단계 추가 (CW와 동일하게)
수정 진행합니다.

# PortableTestMachine2

Portable motor CW/CCW current characteristic inspection system.
Refactored from VB.NET WinForms → C# WPF (.NET 8.0).

## Platform
- .NET 8.0 (net8.0-windows), C#, WPF
- Resolution: 1024×768 (NoResize)
- Dark theme (WELD_MONITOR_IM style)

## Hardware
- Power Supply: SCPI over RS-232 (9600, 8N1, XOnXOff) — voltage control + current measurement
- IO Relay Board: Custom ASCII over RS-232 (115200, 8N1) — CW/CCW motor relay control

## NuGet Packages
- LiveChartsCore.SkiaSharpView.WPF 2.0.0-rc2 — realtime current chart
- System.IO.Ports 8.0.0 — serial communication
- ClosedXML 0.104.2 — Excel export

## File Map

### Core/
- `AppConfig.cs` — config.json R/W, strongly-typed settings (ports, volt, count, stop mode)
- `PathManager.cs` — path management (%LocalAppData%\PortableTestMachine2\)
- `Logger.cs` — thread-safe daily log + crash.log

### Communication/
- `IDeviceService.cs` — device common interface (Connect/Disconnect)
- `PowerSupplyService.cs` — SCPI power supply service (3-step polling: MEAS:CURR? → response → SOURS:VOLT)
- `PowerSupplyProtocol.cs` — SCPI command constants and builders
- `IoBoardService.cs` — IO relay board service (CW/CCW/OFF, DO frame send)
- `IoBoardProtocol.cs` — IO frame constants (S????????E format)

### Inspection/
- `InspectionState.cs` — InspectionStep enum (14 states) + InspectionContext data class
- `InspectionEngine.cs` — state machine engine, background thread, IInspectionCallback impl
- `StepHandlers/IStepHandler.cs` — step handler interface
- `StepHandlers/IInspectionCallback.cs` — callback interface (Log, DataPoint, Result, Completed)
- `StepHandlers/SetVoltageHandler.cs` — voltage setup (Step 10~12)
- `StepHandlers/InitHandler.cs` — inspection init (Step 20)
- `StepHandlers/CycleStartHandler.cs` — cycle start (Step 100)
- `StepHandlers/CwMeasureHandler.cs` — CW measurement (Step 200~204)
- `StepHandlers/CcwMeasureHandler.cs` — CCW measurement (Step 300~301)
- `StepHandlers/CycleCountHandler.cs` — cycle count (Step 400)
- `StepHandlers/CompleteHandler.cs` — inspection complete (Step 500)

### Models/
- `MeasureResult.cs` — measurement result (direction, voltage, max current, time)
- `IoState.cs` — DO bit state

### Data/
- `ExcelExporter.cs` — ClosedXML Excel export (.xlsx)

### UI
- `App.xaml` — global dark theme styles
- `App.xaml.cs` — global exception handler, PathManager init
- `MainWindow.xaml` — main dashboard (chart + condition + manual control + grid + log + buttons)
- `MainWindow.xaml.cs` — serial connect, 10ms polling, chart bindings, engine event handlers
- `AutoSettingsWindow.xaml` — auto inspection settings dialog
- `AutoSettingsWindow.xaml.cs` — settings load/save

## State Machine Flow
```
Idle(0) → SetVoltage(10) → Initialize(20) → CycleStart(100)
→ CwStart(200) → CwMeasure(201) → CwComplete(202) → CwWait(203) → CwToCcw(204)
→ CcwStart(300) → CcwMeasure(301) → CycleCount(400)
→ [repeat or Complete(500) → Idle(0)]
```

## Work History
- 2026-03-17: Initial refactoring from PortableTestMachine (VB.NET) — full rewrite to C# WPF .NET 8.0

## 수정 완료 (빌드 성공)

### 수정 내용

1. **`InspectionEngine.Start()`** — `_context.Reset()` + `CurrentStep = SetVoltage` 추가
   - 기존: 스레드만 시작, Idle 상태 유지 → 아무 동작 안 함
   - 수정: Reset 후 SetVoltage로 진입 → 정상 상태머신 동작

2. **CCW 완료/대기 단계 추가** (CW와 동일한 구조)
   - `InspectionStep.CcwComplete(302)` — CCW 결과 생성 + 모터 OFF
   - `InspectionStep.CcwWait(303)` — 1초 대기 후 CycleCount 전환
   - `CcwMeasureHandler` — CcwComplete, CcwWait 핸들링 추가
   - `CycleCountHandler` — CCW 결과 생성 코드 제거 (CcwComplete로 이관), 순수 카운트 판정만 수행

### 상태머신 흐름 (수정 후)
```
Idle(0) → SetVoltage(10) → Initialize(20) → CycleStart(100)
→ CwStart(200) → CwMeasure(201) → CwComplete(202) → CwWait(203) → CwToCcw(204)
→ CcwStart(300) → CcwMeasure(301) → CcwComplete(302) → CcwWait(303) → CycleCount(400)
→ [반복 or Complete(500) → Idle(0)]
```

<Window x:Class="PortableTestMachine2.AutoSettingsWindow"
        xmlns="http://schemas.microsoft.com/winfx/2006/xaml/presentation"
        xmlns:x="http://schemas.microsoft.com/winfx/2006/xaml"
        Title="자동 검사 설정"
        Width="500" Height="480"
        ResizeMode="NoResize"
        WindowStartupLocation="CenterOwner"
        WindowStyle="None"
        Background="#1E1E1E"
        AllowsTransparency="True">

    <Border BorderBrush="#3A3A3A" BorderThickness="1" CornerRadius="6" Background="#1E1E1E">
        <DockPanel>

            <!-- 커스텀 타이틀 바 -->
            <Border DockPanel.Dock="Top" Height="36" Background="#2B2B2B"
                    CornerRadius="6,6,0,0"
                    MouseLeftButtonDown="TitleBar_MouseLeftButtonDown">
                <Grid>
                    <TextBlock Text="검사 설정" FontSize="14" Foreground="#FFFFFF"
                               VerticalAlignment="Center" Margin="12,0,0,0"/>
                    <Button x:Name="btnTitleClose" Content="X"
                            HorizontalAlignment="Right" VerticalAlignment="Center"
                            Width="36" Height="36"
                            Background="Transparent" BorderThickness="0"
                            Foreground="#9CA3AF" FontSize="14"
                            Click="btnClose_Click"/>
                </Grid>
            </Border>

            <!-- 콘텐츠 영역 -->
            <StackPanel Margin="20">

                <!-- 포트 설정 -->
                <TextBlock Text="통신 포트" Foreground="#9CA3AF" FontSize="12" Margin="0,0,0,6"/>
                <Grid Margin="0,0,0,16">
                    <Grid.RowDefinitions>
                        <RowDefinition Height="40"/>
                        <RowDefinition Height="40"/>
                    </Grid.RowDefinitions>
                    <Grid.ColumnDefinitions>
                        <ColumnDefinition Width="140"/>
                        <ColumnDefinition Width="*"/>
                    </Grid.ColumnDefinitions>

                    <Label Grid.Row="0" Grid.Column="0"
                           Content="파워서플라이" VerticalAlignment="Center"/>
                    <ComboBox x:Name="cboSupplyPort" Grid.Row="0" Grid.Column="1"
                              Margin="0,4" Width="200" HorizontalAlignment="Left"
                              FontFamily="Consolas"/>

                    <Label Grid.Row="1" Grid.Column="0"
                           Content="IO 보드" VerticalAlignment="Center"/>
                    <ComboBox x:Name="cboIoPort" Grid.Row="1" Grid.Column="1"
                              Margin="0,4" Width="200" HorizontalAlignment="Left"
                              FontFamily="Consolas"/>
                </Grid>

                <!-- 구분선 -->
                <Border Height="1" Background="#3A3A3A" Margin="0,0,0,12"/>

                <!-- 자동 검사 설정 -->
                <TextBlock Text="자동 검사" Foreground="#9CA3AF" FontSize="12" Margin="0,0,0,6"/>
                <Grid>
                    <Grid.RowDefinitions>
                        <RowDefinition Height="40"/>
                        <RowDefinition Height="40"/>
                        <RowDefinition Height="40"/>
                        <RowDefinition Height="40"/>
                    </Grid.RowDefinitions>
                    <Grid.ColumnDefinitions>
                        <ColumnDefinition Width="140"/>
                        <ColumnDefinition Width="*"/>
                    </Grid.ColumnDefinitions>

                    <!-- 구동 전압 -->
                    <Label Grid.Row="0" Grid.Column="0"
                           Content="구동 전압 (V)" VerticalAlignment="Center"/>
                    <TextBox x:Name="txtVolt" Grid.Row="0" Grid.Column="1"
                             FontFamily="Consolas" VerticalContentAlignment="Center"
                             Margin="0,4" Width="200" HorizontalAlignment="Left"/>

                    <!-- 검사 횟수 -->
                    <Label Grid.Row="1" Grid.Column="0"
                           Content="검사 횟수" VerticalAlignment="Center"/>
                    <TextBox x:Name="txtCount" Grid.Row="1" Grid.Column="1"
                             FontFamily="Consolas" VerticalContentAlignment="Center"
                             Margin="0,4" Width="200" HorizontalAlignment="Left"/>

                    <!-- 정지 조건 -->
                    <Label Grid.Row="2" Grid.Column="0"
                           Content="정지 조건" VerticalAlignment="Center"/>
                    <ComboBox x:Name="cboStopMode" Grid.Row="2" Grid.Column="1"
                              Margin="0,4" Width="200" HorizontalAlignment="Left"
                              SelectionChanged="cboStopMode_SelectionChanged">
                        <ComboBoxItem Content="CURRENT"/>
                        <ComboBoxItem Content="TIME"/>
                    </ComboBox>

                    <!-- 정지 기준값 -->
                    <Label Grid.Row="3" Grid.Column="0"
                           Content="정지 기준값" VerticalAlignment="Center"/>
                    <StackPanel Grid.Row="3" Grid.Column="1" Orientation="Horizontal"
                                Margin="0,4" VerticalAlignment="Center">
                        <TextBox x:Name="txtStopValue" FontFamily="Consolas"
                                 VerticalContentAlignment="Center" Width="160"/>
                        <TextBlock x:Name="txtUnit" Text="A" Foreground="#9CA3AF"
                                   VerticalAlignment="Center" Margin="8,0,0,0" FontSize="14"/>
                    </StackPanel>
                </Grid>

                <!-- 하단 버튼 -->
                <StackPanel Orientation="Horizontal" HorizontalAlignment="Right" Margin="0,20,0,0">
                    <Button x:Name="btnSave" Content="저장"
                            Background="#1E3A5F" Width="80"
                            Click="btnSave_Click"/>
                    <Button x:Name="btnCancel" Content="닫기"
                            Width="80" Margin="8,0,0,0"
                            Click="btnClose_Click"/>
                </StackPanel>

            </StackPanel>
        </DockPanel>
    </Border>
</Window>

# Build/Publish Agent

## Task Settings
- subagent_type: build-runner
- model: sonnet

## Role
Agent that performs .NET project build and publish, and analyzes/fixes errors when they occur.

## Input
C:\Users\Administrator\Desktop\휴대용 검사기\PortableTestMachine\PortableTestMachine\PortableTestMachine2\PortableTestMachine2.csproj (task type + target path, defaults to current directory if omitted)
- `build` — build only
- `publish` — Release publish
- `publish win-x64` — publish with specific RID
- `clean build` — clean build
- `rebuild` — rebuild (clean + build)
- Path: `build C:\path\to\project`

## Actions

### 1. Project Discovery
- Search for `*.sln`, `*.csproj`, `*.vbproj` in specified or current directory
- If multiple found, ask user to select
- Check project SDK type (WinForms/WPF/Console/MAUI/Library, etc.)
- **Build system detection**: Check TargetFramework
  - `net9.0`, `net8.0`, `net6.0`, etc. → `dotnet` CLI
  - `v4.8`, `v4.7.2`, etc. .NET Framework → `MSBuild`

### 2. Build Execution

#### dotnet CLI (.NET Core/5+)
```bash
# Default build
dotnet build "{project_path}" -c Release

# Clean build
dotnet clean "{project_path}" && dotnet build "{project_path}" -c Release

# MAUI Android
dotnet build -c Release -f net9.0-android -p:AndroidSdkDirectory=C:/android-sdk
```

#### MSBuild (.NET Framework)
```bash
# Find MSBuild path via vswhere
$msbuild = & "C:\Program Files (x86)\Microsoft Visual Studio\Installer\vswhere.exe" -latest -requires Microsoft.Component.MSBuild -find "MSBuild\**\Bin\MSBuild.exe" | Select-Object -First 1

# Default build
& $msbuild "{project_path}" /p:Configuration=Release /restore

# Clean build
& $msbuild "{project_path}" /t:Clean,Build /p:Configuration=Release /restore
```

### 3. Publish Execution
```bash
# Default publish
dotnet publish "{project_path}" -c Release

# Self-contained (no .NET runtime needed on target)
dotnet publish "{project_path}" -c Release -r win-x64 --self-contained

# Single file
dotnet publish "{project_path}" -c Release -r win-x64 --self-contained -p:PublishSingleFile=true

# Trimmed (remove unused assemblies, reduce size)
dotnet publish "{project_path}" -c Release -r win-x64 --self-contained -p:PublishSingleFile=true -p:PublishTrimmed=true
```

### 4. Error Analysis & Fix
On build failure:
1. Classify error messages:
   - **CS codes** (CS0246, CS1061, etc.): Compile errors — missing references, type errors
   - **MSB codes** (MSB3073, MSB4019, etc.): Build system errors — SDK/tool issues
   - **NU codes** (NU1101, NU1605, etc.): NuGet package errors — package restore failures
   - **NETSDK codes**: SDK installation/version issues
2. Identify cause and suggest fix
3. **Fix code only after user confirmation** (no auto-fix)
4. Rebuild after fix

### 5. Result Report
```
## Build Result
- Status: Success/Failure
- Project: {name}
- Build Tool: dotnet CLI / MSBuild
- Configuration: Release | {RID}
- Output: {output path}
- Warnings: N
- Duration: X seconds
```

## Rules
- User confirmation required before fixing build errors
- Report warnings but do not auto-fix
- Automatically add AndroidSdkDirectory property for MAUI Android builds
- Clearly indicate publish output path
- Try `dotnet restore` first on NuGet restore failures
- Auto-detect MSBuild path via vswhere for .NET Framework projects

# PortableTestMachine2

Portable motor CW/CCW current characteristic inspection system.
Refactored from VB.NET WinForms → C# WPF (.NET 8.0).

## Platform
- .NET 8.0 (net8.0-windows), C#, WPF
- Resolution: 1024×768 (NoResize)
- Dark theme (WELD_MONITOR_IM style)

## Hardware
- Power Supply: SCPI over RS-232 (9600, 8N1, XOnXOff) — voltage control + current measurement
- IO Relay Board: Custom ASCII over RS-232 (115200, 8N1) — CW/CCW motor relay control

## NuGet Packages
- LiveChartsCore.SkiaSharpView.WPF 2.0.0-rc2 — realtime current chart
- System.IO.Ports 8.0.0 — serial communication
- ClosedXML 0.104.2 — Excel export

## File Map

### Core/
- `AppConfig.cs` — config.json R/W, strongly-typed settings (ports, volt, count, stop mode)
- `PathManager.cs` — path management (%LocalAppData%\PortableTestMachine2\)
- `Logger.cs` — thread-safe daily log + crash.log

### Communication/
- `IDeviceService.cs` — device common interface (Connect/Disconnect)
- `PowerSupplyService.cs` — SCPI power supply service (3-step polling: MEAS:CURR? → response → SOURS:VOLT)
- `PowerSupplyProtocol.cs` — SCPI command constants and builders
- `IoBoardService.cs` — IO relay board service (CW/CCW/OFF, DO frame send)
- `IoBoardProtocol.cs` — IO frame constants (S????????E format)

### Inspection/
- `InspectionState.cs` — InspectionStep enum (14 states) + InspectionContext data class
- `InspectionEngine.cs` — state machine engine, background thread, IInspectionCallback impl
- `StepHandlers/IStepHandler.cs` — step handler interface
- `StepHandlers/IInspectionCallback.cs` — callback interface (Log, DataPoint, Result, Completed)
- `StepHandlers/SetVoltageHandler.cs` — voltage setup (Step 10~12)
- `StepHandlers/InitHandler.cs` — inspection init (Step 20)
- `StepHandlers/CycleStartHandler.cs` — cycle start (Step 100)
- `StepHandlers/CwMeasureHandler.cs` — CW measurement (Step 200~204)
- `StepHandlers/CcwMeasureHandler.cs` — CCW measurement (Step 300~301)
- `StepHandlers/CycleCountHandler.cs` — cycle count (Step 400)
- `StepHandlers/CompleteHandler.cs` — inspection complete (Step 500)

### Models/
- `MeasureResult.cs` — measurement result (direction, voltage, max current, time)
- `IoState.cs` — DO bit state

### Data/
- `ExcelExporter.cs` — ClosedXML Excel export (.xlsx)

### UI
- `App.xaml` — global dark theme styles
- `App.xaml.cs` — global exception handler, PathManager init
- `MainWindow.xaml` — main dashboard (chart + condition + manual control + grid + log + buttons)
- `MainWindow.xaml.cs` — serial connect, 10ms polling, chart bindings, engine event handlers
- `AutoSettingsWindow.xaml` — auto inspection settings dialog
- `AutoSettingsWindow.xaml.cs` — settings load/save

## State Machine Flow
```
Idle(0) → SetVoltage(10) → Initialize(20) → CycleStart(100)
→ CwStart(200) → CwMeasure(201) → CwComplete(202) → CwWait(203) → CwToCcw(204)
→ CcwStart(300) → CcwMeasure(301) → CcwComplete(302) → CcwWait(303) → CycleCount(400)
→ [repeat or Complete(500) → Idle(0)]
```

## Work History
- 2026-03-17: Initial refactoring from PortableTestMachine (VB.NET) — full rewrite to C# WPF .NET 8.0
- 2026-03-17: Fix — InspectionEngine.Start() now resets context + sets initial step (SetVoltage), added CCW complete/wait steps (302/303) matching CW flow
